rulings.Case Title: PASSERI VS PACIFIC LIFE INSURANCE CO
rulings.Rulings: Cause of action for sexual battery = GRANT AS TO BELL BECAUSE HE DID NOT ENGAGE IN THE CONDUCT. DENY AS TO DAHLQUIST. c/a for quid pro quo sexual harassment = DENY AS TO PACIFIC LIFE AND DAHLQUIST. GRANT AS TO BELL. c/a for environmental sexual harassment = DENY AS TO PACIFIC LIFE AND DAHLQUIST. GRANT AS TO BELL. c/a for gender discrim--FEHA = DENY, TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE WHETHER FAILURE TO PROMOTE WAS MOTIVATED BY INVIDIOUS DISCRIMINATION. COURT DISMISSES CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER THE COMMON LAW AND CONST. AS DUPLICATIVE. c/a for retaliation = GRANT AS TO ALL DEFEENDANTS. NO MATERIALLY ADVERSE EMPLOYMENT ACTION. c/a for defamation = GRANT DEFAMATION IN ENTIRETY. c/a for neg. hiring/supervision = GRANT AS TO PACIFIC LIFE BASED UPON COIT AND WORKER'S COMP. EXCLUSIVITY. GRANT AS TO BELL UNDER SHEPPARD. c/a for assault & battery = GRANT AS TO PACIFIC LIFE UNDER FRETLAND. GRANT AS TO BELL BECAUSE DID NOT ENGAGE IN CONDUCT. DENY AS TO DAHLQUIST. c/a for IIED = DENY AS TO PACIFIC LIFE AND DAHLQUIST. GRANT AS TO BELL. c/a for Negligent Infliction of Emotional Distress = GRANT AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF DEMOSNTRATES INTENTIONAL CONDUCT. See Semore v. Pool, (1990) 217 Cal.App.3d 1087, 1105. c/a for Intentional Interference with contract=GRANT AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS. c/a for invasion of privacy = GRANT. PLAINTIFF'S REMEDY IS TO SUE FOR BATTERY AND NO INTRUSION. c/a for Breach of Contract = GRANT, NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE AT-WILL STATUS. c/a for violation of CC 51.7 = GRANT AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS. c/a for prima facie tort = GRANT UNDER CABANAS. CAUSE OF ACTION IMPROPER BECAUSE CONDUCT AT ISSUE GOVERNED BY EXISTING TORTS. DENY CCP 437c(h) CONTINUANCE. (PB)
